title: dryopteris crinalis
intro: Dryopteris crinalis, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of fern native to the southeastern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of D. crinalis include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and bronchial spasms. The herbal preparations of D. crinalis often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
